center.name: 索马里兰
center.summary: 索马里兰是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Chestnut-naped spurfowl、Three-banded courser、红顶短趾百灵等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: At in length and weighing , it is a large species of spurfowl. It is found in Ethiopia and Somaliland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in East Africa, within the borders of Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, Somaliland, South Sudan, and Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Angola, Botswana, Ethiopia, Kenya, Namibia, Rwanda, Somalia, Somaliland, South Africa, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-capped lark (Calandrella cinerea) is a small passerine bird that breeds in the highlands of eastern Africa southwards from Ethiopia and Somaliland
